fold_many0
result.signature:
pub fn fold_many0<I, E, F, G, H, R>(
  parser: F,
  init: H,
  g: G,
) -> impl Parser<I, Output = R, Error = E>
where
  I: Clone + InputLength,
  F: Parser<I, Error = E>,
  G: FnMut(R, <F as Parser<I>>::Output) -> R,
  H: FnMut() -> R,
  E: ParseError<I>,
{
  FoldMany0 {
    parser,
    g,
    init,
    r: PhantomData,
  }
}

pub fn fold_many_m_n<I, E, F, G, H, R>(
  min: usize,
  max: usize,
  parser: F,
  init: H,
  g: G,
) -> impl Parser<I, Output = R, Error = E>
where
  I: Clone + InputLength,
  F: Parser<I, Error = E>,
  G: FnMut(R, <F as Parser<I>>::Output) -> R,
  H: FnMut() -> R,
  E: ParseError<I>,
{
  FoldManyMN {
    parser,
    g,
    init,
    min,
    max,
    r: PhantomData,
  }
}

result.name: process
length_data
result.signature:
pub fn length_data<I, E, F>(f: F) -> impl Parser<I, Output = I, Error = E>
where
  I: Input,
  <F as Parser<I>>::Output: ToUsize,
  F: Parser<I, Error = E>,
  E: ParseError<I>,
{
  f.flat_map(|size| take(size))
}

result.name: length_value
process
length_count
result.signature:
pub fn length_count<I, E, F, G>(
  f: F,
  g: G,
) -> impl Parser<I, Output = Vec<<G as Parser<I>>::Output>, Error = E>
where
  I: Clone,
  <F as Parser<I>>::Output: ToUsize,
  F: Parser<I, Error = E>,
  G: Parser<I, Error = E>,
  E: ParseError<I>,
{
  LengthCount {
    length: f,
    parser: g,
    e: PhantomData,
  }
}
